MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER THE CLOCKTOWER LOFTS OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Hearing On Petition is Off calendar. An Order denying the petition was filed on October 29, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Nov-21-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY R. CLUETT OF THE LAW OFFICES OF ANN RANKIN, TEL. NO. (510)653-8886 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
SUSAN VERBA, TEL. NO. (530)752-2614, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO-PER;
JOHN MORETTO, DISINTERESTED PARTY.

RULING - The matter was argued regarding specifics regarding the assertion that 17 matters were presented to the owners on a take-it-or-leave-it basis. PETITIONER THE CLOCKTOWER LOFTS OWNERS ASSOCIATION's Petition To Approve Amendments is continued to November 21, 2014 for the court to look at the papers submitted today by Respondent. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
